name: Petra
overview: Petra is a Mythic-quality Generation 3 Hero in Kingshot, classiﬁed under the Cavalry class. You can unlock her through Hero Roulette.
conquest: Petra throws a tarot card at an enemy, dealing Attack * 378%
damage and inﬂicting one of the following eﬀects: reducing the
target’s Attack by 20% for 2s or stunning the target for 1.5s.
Petra curses an enemy, dealing ﬂoating damage based on the
base value of Petra’s Attack * 70%. The ﬁnal damage is a
random amount between 5% and 600% of that base value.
Petra reverses misfortune by healing a friendly hero with the
lowest percentage of Health remaining based on the base value
of Petra’s Attack * 140%. The ﬁnal Health restored is a random
amount ranging between 5% and 400% of that base value.
expedition: Grants all Squads’ Attack a 50% chance of cursing the target,
Petra is known as a lucky fortune-teller to her soldiers, granting
a 50% chance of increasing the Squads’ Attack by 50%.
Petra’s divination navigates bad outcomes with a 40% chance
of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.
gear: Petra has become more skilled at weighting the cards of fate in
her favor, increasing the upper and lower limit of her ﬂuctuating
“Strike!” The cards never fail to inform Petra of the right time to
act. Petra increases Rally Squad Attack by 15%.

name: Rosa
overview: Rosa is a Mythic-quality Generation 4 hero in Kingshot, classiﬁed under the Archer class. You can unlock her through the Hero Roulette and Swordland Showdown Shop.

Rosa spins her fan blade out with dazzling ferocity, dealing
Attack * 300% damage to enemies in its path.
Rosa’s dancing is a wonderful distraction from the tyranny of
the battleﬁeld, reducing Attack Speed by 3% and healing
eﬀects by 60% for all enemy squads.
expedition: Well-placed chaos is prologue to success. Rosa grants a 40%
chance of increasing all Squads’ Damage Dealt by 50%.
No soldier wishes to harm this wild rose of war, reducing
damage dealt by 20% for all enemy squads.

gear: Upon casting Battle Focus, Rosa increases her Attack by 15%
until the end of the battle.
Rosa’s performances greatly increase your soldiers’ willingness
to ﬁght, increasing Rally Squad’s Lethality by 15%.
